deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip analysis. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, projected profit $42-62K. 31 comps pulled, avg $207K. Foundation for branded property analysis template.
deals.next: Chris to pull MLS comps and RPR report, feed to Sirhc for analysis sheet

logs.m: Deal received via homesteadvested.com link, used as basis for property analysis tool

deals.title: Borregas Land

Isaac development interest discussed, mobile home concept for veterans and profit

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Sellers moving back in to make updates and repairs, will relist later. VA loan balance ~$493K, underwater by $93-143K. Double-carrying costs. Short sale path was recommended.
deals.next: Relationship intact, ended on good terms

logs.m: Listing terminated, sellers moving back in, plan to relist after updates
Honest conversation held, three paths presented, Chandler laid off, short sale leaning

deals.title: 301 W Saxet Wholesale
deals.notes: Wholesale property at $85K, FHA 203k rehab play. Two structures, one livable one teardown. Mike and Alice evaluated, determined too much scope. Connected with Isaac, Josh LT remains interested.
deals.next: Back to new construction search for Mike and Alice

logs.m: Out of deal, too much scope, back to active searching
Isaac brought wholesale deal, connected buyers directly

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: Divorce sale, 3/2 brick home on 4.05 acres. Payoff ~$257K. Recommended list price $295K nets ~$14.7K to sellers. Thin market, 3 comps in 10 miles. Colton looking for contractor work.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter, confirm acreage, schedule professional photos, get listing agreement signed

logs.m: Met at property, pulled CMA, confirmed payoff, built net sheet
Prior clients reconnected through Cynthia Dominguez network

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA, listed May 14. Sellers relocating to NC, second week of June deadline. List price $259,900. Multiple showings, second-look buyers are hottest lead. Hairline foundation crack flagged, roof claim moving forward.
deals.next: Confirm May 30 showing time, monitor for backup offers, follow up with hot buyers

logs.m: Investor cash offer at $176,300 discussed, kept conversation open
MLS live, first showing feedback received, neighborhood canvassed

deals.title: 9815 Conbes

deals.next: Pull CMA, set up listing timeline with photos and pricing, determine if seller or buyer

logs.m: Neighbor conversation, watching nearby listing status

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale, cash transaction $152K. Closed and funded Apr 27, 2026. Lien blocker resolved through mobile notary. Military buyer via Exquisite SA.

Lien release signed at mobile notary, delivered to title

deals.title: 181 CR 7751

leads.next: Get contact info, qualify VA eligibility, connect with VA-approved lender, send VA Buyers Guide

leads.next: Confirm builder visits with Brandon and mom, register as buyer's agent before first visit, pull new construction options
